app.name: Nx
app.one_liner: Nx is a high-performance monorepo platform built with Rust and TypeScript that enables incremental adoption, AI-native tooling, and polyglot support for scalable development workflows.

screens.name: Nx Workspace Dashboard
screens.purpose: Provide an overview of projects, tasks, and dependency graph with quick access to run targets and view affected changes.

rust_commands.name: execute_task
rust_commands.purpose: Spawn child processes for build/test/lint tasks with proper shell quoting and Windows process hiding.

rust_commands.name: scan_dependencies
rust_commands.purpose: Use the native Rust scanner to parse source files and infer dependencies across polyglot codebases.

mvp_plan: week 1: Initialize Nx workspace with `npx nx init`
week 1: Integrate existing npm scripts as Nx targets
acceptance_tests: Concurrent execution of multiple Nx targets does not crash the daemon or ignore parallel flags
File saves in Windows do not trigger visible cmd.exe flashes due to proper windowsHide configuration
Rust scanner correctly parses imports without misinterpreting string literals on macOS case-insensitive filesystems
